subTitle: Manmohan observes Vibhuti disguised as a criminal romancing Anita, yet his interference leads to unexpected bullying. When Angoori discovers Manmohan held captive at knifepoint, the family retaliates against the intruder until he flees.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti exits Angoori's baby shower celebration. Later, as he plans to move away, Manmohan overhears and pleads with him to stay.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti tries to help Angoori win the challenge by stealing supplies from his own house and keeping it in Angoori's refrigerator. Later, Manmohan learns that Anita has decided to challenge Vibhuti.

title: Laal Ishq

subTitle: Tara and Sitara, siblings and small-time con-men, are on the run from a wanted criminal after they accidentally shoot at him. Soon they end up at the house of major Ram Singh, where they take refuge.

subTitle: Teeka falls for Muskaan and her brother Mantaram decides to bring her to discuss marriage. Later, Tiwari and Bibhuti along Angoori and Anita joins them.

subTitle: Teeka decides to break up with Muskaan after discovering her secret. Meanwhile, Reshampal and Happu refuse to act against Mantaram.

subTitle: The tantrik advises marrying Tikka and Muskan to end strange occurrences. Subsequently, the members of Modern Colony promptly begins wedding preparations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti moves to the living room because he is unable to sleep due to Tiwari's loud snoring. Later, a confused Saxena enters the bedroom and beats Tiwari after mistaking him for Vibhuti.
